title: Robin Finds the Ancient Truth
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, King Neptune, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is robin finds the ancient truth.
scene: The scene follows robin finds the ancient truth, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, King Neptune, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fifty thousand May have fallen!! But fifty thousand more still remain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates are the greatest obstacle to our proud ambitions!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Leave some for us, would you?

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: and jimbei is the very embodiment of Otohime's dream!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The model of a detestable future in which our kind make peace with the human menace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going for thirty thousand! Hear that, Marimo?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so you think you can protect the gigantic mermaid Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...right in the middle of this open plaza?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She... didn't even need my help?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sheer power of Captain Holy's UCHIMIZU ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...enhanced by his newly- awakened monstrous strength...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That man really is a monster!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmph...... I don't know where you found all this power,

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: But in fish-man karate, you are little better than a child....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the first fish-man ever to serve as a member of the Royal Shichibukal...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard his bounty went over four hundred million after he abandoned his post!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Quit your jobbering and fight me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will only take the Princess' life if you can take all of ours first!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Firing Squad!! Take aim at Princess Shirahoshii !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho!! We can't be having that, can we?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would dare to harm the mermaid Princess, idol of men the world over?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh?! are we... Dreaming or some- thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Send your fireworks Soaring on High!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heyy!! I said aim at the Princess, Bogan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Today's the Day of the Festival... UHA?

summary: Robin Finds the Ancient Truth. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
